title: Guest List
description: Browse and manage all guest profiles in your system.

list.no_guests_message: No guests found. Try adding a new guest or adjusting your filters.

add_modal.title: Add New Guest Profile
add_modal.description: Create a new guest record. Fill in as much detail as possible.

edit_modal.title: Edit Guest Profile
edit_modal.description: Update the details for this guest.

form.notes_placeholder: e.g., Prefers high-floor rooms, allergic to peanuts...
form.enroll_loyalty_label: Enroll this guest in the loyalty program.

profile.title: Profile: {{name}}
profile.description: A complete overview of the guest's history and details.

history_tab.title: Reservation History
history_tab.description: A log of all past, present, and future bookings for {{name}}.
history_tab.empty_state: No reservations found for this guest.

loyalty_tab.title: Loyalty Program Activity
loyalty_tab.description: A detailed history of all loyalty points earned and redeemed by {{name}}.
loyalty_tab.not_enrolled: This guest is not currently enrolled in the loyalty program.
loyalty_tab.no_activity: No loyalty activity has been recorded yet.

notes_tab.title: Internal Notes
notes_tab.description: Private notes and preferences for staff reference. Not visible to the guest.
notes_tab.placeholder: Add notes about guest preferences, special requests, or incidents...
notes_tab.save_success_description: The internal notes for this guest have been updated.
notes_tab.save_error_description: Could not save notes. Please try again.

delete_confirmation.title: Are you sure?
delete_confirmation.description: This will permanently delete the profile for {{name}}. This action cannot be undone.
delete_confirmation.description_plural: This will permanently delete {{count}} guest profiles. This action cannot be undone.

toasts.permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
toasts.delete_error: An error occurred while deleting guests.
toasts.tag_add_error: Could not add tags to all selected guests.
toasts.update_success: Guest profile for {{name}} has been updated.
toasts.add_success: New guest profile for {{name}} has been created.
toasts.save_error: Could not save guest data. Please check the form and try again.
toasts.save_error_generic: An error occurred while saving the guest data.
toasts.error_loading_property: Could not load property data for your user profile. Some features may be disabled.
toasts.loyalty_disabled_description: The loyalty program is not enabled for this property. Please enable it in the settings.
toasts.loyalty_enroll_success: {{name}} has been enrolled in the loyalty program.
toasts.loyalty_unenroll_success: {{name}} has been unenrolled from the loyalty program.
toasts.loyalty_update_error: Could not update loyalty enrollment status.

bulk_tag_modal.title: Add Tag to {{count}} Guests
bulk_tag_modal.description: Select a tag to apply to all selected guests. This will not remove existing tags.
bulk_tag_modal.label: Tag to Apply

stats.title: Guest Statistics
stats.description: An overview of this guest's lifetime value and stay habits.
